scripts.gen:templ: cd ../generated && go run github.com/a-h/templ/cmd/templ@v0.3.1001 generate ./... && cd ../examples/templ && go run github.com/a-h/templ/cmd/templ@v0.3.1001 generate ./...
scripts.dev:templ: bun run gen:templ && bun run build:css && cd templ && go run ./cmd/server
scripts.dev:latte: bun run composer:install && bun run build:css && cd latte && php -S 127.0.0.1:5176 server.php
scripts.dev:twig: bun run composer:install && bun run build:css && cd twig && php -S 127.0.0.1:5177 server.php
